shipguard-devspace.title: ShipGuard Devspace
shipguard-devspace.description: Expose iOS preview, visual event, and Codex handoff tools for ShipGuard.
args: if [ -n "${SHIPGUARD_CLI:-}" ] && [ -x "$SHIPGUARD_CLI" ]; then exec "$SHIPGUARD_CLI" ios devspace --stdio; elif command -v shipguard >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec shipguard ios devspace --stdio; elif [ -x "$HOME/.local/bin/shipguard" ]; then exec "$HOME/.local/bin/shipguard" ios devspace --stdio; elif [ -x ./bin/shipguard ]; then exec ./bin/shipguard ios devspace --stdio; else echo "ShipGuard CLI not found. Install it with PREFIX=\"$HOME/.local\" ./scripts/install.sh or set SHIPGUARD_CLI to an executable shipguard path." >&2; exit 127; fi
